testcase.name: tests.test_client
testcase.error: tests/test_client.py:9: in <module> from coinbaseadvanced.client import CoinbaseAdvancedTradeAPIClient, Side, StopDirection, Granularity coinbaseadvanced/client.py:17: in <module> from coinbaseadvanced.models.common import EmptyResponse, UnixTime coinbaseadvanced/models/common.py:7: in <module> from coinbaseadvanced.models.error import CoinbaseAdvancedTradeAPIError coinbaseadvanced/models/error.py:9: in <module> class CoinbaseAdvancedTradeAPIError(Exception): coinbaseadvanced/models/error.py:22: in CoinbaseAdvancedTradeAPIError def not_ok_response(cls, response: treq.Response) -> 'CoinbaseAdvancedTradeAPIError': ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'Response'
